title: Virtual Machine has Port 3389 (RDP) open to the Internet (0.0.0.0/0)
description: The Network Security Group (NSG) attached to the VM allows unrestricted inbound access on port 3389. This poses a high risk of brute-force attacks and ransomware deployment.
remediation: Restrict inbound traffic on port 3389 to known, trusted IP addresses or implement Just-In-Time (JIT) VM access.
